image-to-video.title: Gemini Omni Image to Video - Turn Stills into Cinematic Motion
image-to-video.description: Start from a still image, add camera intent and timing, then turn it into a controllable AI video workflow.
image-to-video.subtitle: Transform still frames into motion-driven video shots with clearer prompt control and cinematic pacing.

faqs.question: What makes image to video usable in production?
faqs.answer: The starting frame must stay stable while motion, timing, and continuity are easy to direct. The workflow matters as much as the model.

faqs.question: What inputs should I prepare?
faqs.answer: Bring a clean opening frame, a clear motion brief, and optionally a reference clip if you need the camera move to feel specific.

reference-video-generator.title: Gemini Omni Reference Video Generator - Build AI Video from Real Inputs
reference-video-generator.description: Use image, video, and audio references together so the output follows real creative direction instead of vague prompts.
reference-video-generator.subtitle: Blend reference images, clips, and soundtrack cues inside a single AI video generation workflow.

faqs.question: Why are references important?
faqs.answer: References compress visual taste, motion language, and continuity into something the system can follow more reliably than text alone.

faqs.question: Can I mix multiple input types?
faqs.answer: Yes. The strongest workflows combine stills, example motion, and a detailed prompt so the system gets both structure and intention.

dance-motion-transfer.title: Gemini Omni Dance Motion Transfer - Clone Movement with New Characters
dance-motion-transfer.description: Transfer choreography timing and energy from a reference dance clip into a new AI video with clearer control.
dance-motion-transfer.subtitle: Use a motion reference clip to carry choreography, rhythm, and body timing into a fresh output sequence.

faqs.question: What should the source clip contain?
faqs.answer: Choose footage with readable full-body motion, consistent framing, and clean timing so movement can be interpreted correctly.

faqs.question: How do I keep identity consistent?
faqs.answer: Add a strong character still or several visual references alongside the motion clip, then describe what must stay locked.

product-ad-generator.title: Gemini Omni Product Ad Generator - Turn Product Frames into Campaign Video
product-ad-generator.description: Generate polished product motion tests and campaign shots from still images, motion references, and commercial prompts.
product-ad-generator.subtitle: Turn product stills into glossy reveal shots, launch teasers, and campaign-ready visual loops.

faqs.question: What makes product video prompts work?
faqs.answer: Product ads work best when the prompt describes camera movement, material response, lighting changes, and the intended brand mood.

faqs.question: Should I add reference footage?
faqs.answer: Yes. Even a short reference for the dolly move or reveal style makes commercial outputs much more predictable.

storyboard-to-video.title: Gemini Omni Storyboard to Video - Extend Still Frames into Previs
storyboard-to-video.description: Convert storyboard frames or still compositions into moving previs shots for scene timing and camera exploration.
storyboard-to-video.subtitle: Stretch still sequences into motion for previs, blocking, and scene continuity tests before production.

faqs.question: Is this meant for final footage?
faqs.answer: Usually no. This workflow is strongest for previs, shot planning, and creative alignment before committing to production.

faqs.question: How many frames should I supply?
faqs.answer: One strong frame can work, but a sequence of key frames gives the system better guidance on scene continuity.

video-extension.title: Gemini Omni Video Extension - Continue Existing Clips Smoothly
video-extension.description: Extend an existing clip with smoother continuity, matching scene logic, camera direction, and motion momentum.
video-extension.subtitle: Keep the same scene alive beyond the original clip by continuing motion and visual logic instead of restarting from scratch.

faqs.question: What makes extension believable?
faqs.answer: Believable extension depends on preserving the direction of movement, scene geography, and lighting continuity from the source clip.

faqs.question: Can I add a target last frame?
faqs.answer: Yes. A target end frame is often the best way to force continuity and give the model a destination instead of a vague continuation.

ai-music-video-generator.title: Gemini Omni AI Music Video Generator - Build Rhythm-Led Visual Sequences
ai-music-video-generator.description: Use Gemini Omni to turn prompts, mood frames, motion references, and rhythm cues into music-video-style AI shots.
ai-music-video-generator.h1: Gemini Omni AI Music Video Generator
ai-music-video-generator.subtitle: Create rhythm-aware visual sequences by combining prompt direction, image references, motion clips, and soundtrack cues.

faqs.question: What matters most in an AI music video workflow?
faqs.answer: Beat clarity, motion energy, subject stability, and camera pacing matter more than adding too many unrelated references.

faqs.question: Should I upload audio references?
faqs.answer: Yes, if the rhythm and emotional timing are important. Audio cues are helpful when the visual motion needs to follow a beat structure.

ecommerce-product-video-ai.title: Gemini Omni Ecommerce Product Video AI - Turn Product Frames into Sales Motion
ecommerce-product-video-ai.description: Create ecommerce-ready product video shots from still imagery, reveal references, and commercial prompts inside Gemini Omni.
ecommerce-product-video-ai.h1: Gemini Omni Ecommerce Product Video AI
ecommerce-product-video-ai.subtitle: Turn product stills into launch loops, reveal shots, and ecommerce-ready campaign edits with clearer motion control.

faqs.question: What is the best starting asset for ecommerce video?
faqs.answer: A clean hero product image with clear material detail is usually the strongest starting point.

faqs.question: Why add camera references for product work?
faqs.answer: Because reveal shots, sweeps, and orbit moves are easier to guide when the camera language already has a visual reference.

ai-short-drama-maker.title: Gemini Omni AI Short Drama Maker - Build Previs and Short Narrative Beats
ai-short-drama-maker.description: Use Gemini Omni to explore short-form drama scenes with storyboards, keyframes, motion references, and scene continuity prompts.
ai-short-drama-maker.h1: Gemini Omni AI Short Drama Maker
ai-short-drama-maker.subtitle: Plan short drama scenes, emotional beats, and camera continuity before full production by turning still ideas into motion.

faqs.question: Is this meant for final drama episodes?
faqs.answer: Usually it is more useful for previs, beat testing, camera rhythm, and scene exploration than for fully finished narrative production.

faqs.question: What should a short-drama team prepare first?
faqs.answer: A strong keyframe or storyboard still, a clear emotional objective for the shot, and prompt notes about pacing and continuity.

cinematic-product-reveal-generator.title: Gemini Omni Cinematic Product Reveal Generator - Design Premium Launch Shots
cinematic-product-reveal-generator.description: Use Gemini Omni to generate cinematic product reveal videos with richer motion design, light sweeps, and premium launch pacing.
cinematic-product-reveal-generator.h1: Gemini Omni Cinematic Product Reveal Generator
cinematic-product-reveal-generator.subtitle: Build premium product reveal shots with stronger camera intent, lighting accents, and launch-friendly pacing.

faqs.question: What makes a reveal shot feel premium?
faqs.answer: Camera restraint, material legibility, highlight control, and a clear movement arc usually matter more than fast or complicated motion.

faqs.question: Can this start from one still product image?
faqs.answer: Yes. A polished still can anchor the shot, and motion references can then define how the reveal unfolds.
